---
#title: "Lindsay Rankin"
image: images/headshot.jpeg
toc: false
about:
  template: broadside
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lindsayerankin/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/LindsayRankin
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:LindsayRankin@gmail.com
---

Hi there!

I'm Lindsay Rankin. \
(Sometimes Lindsay E Rankin)

I work in data science, data analysis, statistics, and research.

I have a PhD in social psychology (both experimental and survey research) with a quantitative methods concentration. After my formal education, I continued building my statistics and data skills, particularly a specialization in R programming.

Welcome, see more in my About, and poke around!
